task_completion.description: Update the Description or Notes field for WAR-HVAC-001 and WAR-HVAC-002 with new warranty expiration dates.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots of the OpenMaint interface showing the CI cards or edit forms for WAR-HVAC-001 and WAR-HVAC-002, with date-like text added to their 'Description' or 'Notes' fields.

task_completion.description: Update the Description or Notes field for WAR-ELEV-001 with its new warranty expiration date.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots of the OpenMaint interface showing the CI card or edit form for WAR-ELEV-001, with date-like text added to its 'Description' or 'Notes' field.

task_completion.description: Create a 'High' priority corrective maintenance work order for WAR-GEN-001.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A screenshot showing a newly created or in-progress Corrective Maintenance Work Order in OpenMaint. The priority dropdown/field must be set to 'High' and the description must explicitly include the CI code 'WAR-GEN-001'.

task_completion.description: Create a 'High' priority corrective maintenance work order for WAR-ELEC-003.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A screenshot showing a newly created or in-progress Corrective Maintenance Work Order in OpenMaint. The priority dropdown/field must be set to 'High' and the description must explicitly include the CI code 'WAR-ELEC-003'.

task_completion.description: Mark WAR-ELEC-001 as 'OUT OF WARRANTY' in its notes.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A screenshot of the CI card or edit form for WAR-ELEC-001 in OpenMaint, showing the text 'OUT OF WARRANTY' in the 'Notes' field.

task_completion.description: Do not modify the record for WAR-PUMP-002.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Verify across all screenshots that there is no evidence of the agent editing the record for WAR-PUMP-002 or creating a work order for it.

integrity.description: The agent must use the OpenMaint web interface to complete the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for a web browser open to http://localhost:8090/cmdbuild/ui/ where the agent is clicking through menus, searching, and filling out forms, rather than executing API scripts or database commands in the terminal.

integrity.description: The agent must locate existing records via search without creating new CIs.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for the agent using the search/filter functionality in OpenMaint to find the WAR-* items. There should be no screenshots showing the creation of brand new Configuration Items (CIs) for the assets.

integrity.description: The agent must read the procurement report to get the warranty dates.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for a text editor (like gedit, nano, vim) or a terminal command (like cat, less) displaying the contents of /home/ga/Desktop/warranty_audit_report.txt.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires updating existing records in OpenMaint based on a text report. Items to update with new warranty dates: WAR-HVAC-001, WAR-HVAC-002, WAR-ELEV-001. Items requiring new 'High' priority corrective maintenance work orders: WAR-GEN-001, WAR-ELEC-003. Item to mark as 'OUT OF WARRANTY': WAR-ELEC-001. Contamination item that MUST NOT be modified: WAR-PUMP-002.
